_**Agent**_

## ✅ Layout Updated: More Space for Results

I've successfully adjusted the layout proportions as requested:

### 🎯 **What Changed:**

**Before:**
- Route Testing Block: `col-lg-8` (66.7% width)
- Response Viewer: `col-lg-4` (33.3% width)

**After:**
- Route Testing Block: `col-lg-4` (33.3% width) - **1/3 space**
- Response Viewer: `col-lg-8` (66.7% width) - **2/3 space**

### 🎉 **Benefits:**

- ✅ **More room for tables**: TableData results now have much more horizontal space
- ✅ **Better chart visibility**: Charts and visualizations get more screen real estate
- ✅ **Improved readability**: JSON responses and large datasets are easier to read
- ✅ **Responsive design**: Still maintains Bootstrap's responsive behavior on smaller screens

### 📱 **Responsive Behavior:**
- **Large screens** (`lg` and up): 1/3 - 2/3 split
- **Medium/small screens**: Both cards stack vertically for mobile-friendly viewing

The results card now has twice as much space to display your TableData tables, charts, and JSON responses! Perfect for viewing those detailed league history tables. 🎉

(window.translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}') : 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            const labels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =\u003e matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', i + 1));\r\n\r\n            createScatterChartMultiAxis(\r\n                data.data,\r\n                data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                'chartTeamPointsWeekly',\r\n                'Points per Match Day',\r\n                labels\r\n            );\r\n\r\n            // Create cumulative positions chart\r\n            createLineChart(\r\n                data.data_accumulated,\r\n                data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                'chartTeamPointsCumulated',\r\n                'Points in Season Progress',\r\n                labels,\r\n                false\r\n            );\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading team points:', error);\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_averages?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n    ",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Fetch and create points charts\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_points?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            // Create labels based on number of weeks\r\n            const numWeeks = Object.values(data.data)[0].length;\r\n            const matchDayFormat = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}') : 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            const labels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =\u003e matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', i + 1));\r\n\r\n            createScatterChartMultiAxis(\r\n                data.data,\r\n                data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                'chartTeamPointsWeekly',\r\n                'Points per Match Day',\r\n                labels\r\n            );\r\n\r\n            // Create cumulative positions chart\r\n            createLineChart(\r\n                data.data_accumulated,\r\n                data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                'chartTeamPointsCumulated',\r\n                'Points in Season Progress',\r\n                labels,\r\n                false\r\n            );\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading team points:', error);\r\n        });\r\n\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_averages?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n    ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class ResponseDisplayBlock extends BaseContentBlock {\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Prepare scatter chart data for createScatterChart_vanilla\r\n     */\r\n    prepareScatterChartData(data, numericKeys) {\r\n        if (numericKeys.length \u003c 2) return null;\r\n        \r\n        const xKey = numericKeys[0];\r\n        const yKey = numericKeys[1];\r\n        \r\n        // Format data for createScatterChart_vanilla\r\n        const scatterData = data.map(item =\u003e [item[xKey], item[yKey]]);\r\n        \r\n        return {\r\n            scatterData: scatterData,\r\n            axisLabels: [xKey, yKey],\r\n            title: &#96;${yKey} vs ${xKey}&#96;\r\n        };\r\n    }",

          {
            "lineNumber": 942,
            "text": "        // Format data for createScatterChart_vanilla\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 943,
            "text": "        const scatterData = data.map(item =\u003e [item[xKey], item[yKey]]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 944,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 945,
            "text": "        return {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 946,
            "text": "            scatterData: scatterData,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 947,
            "text": "            axisLabels: [xKey, yKey],\r"

          {

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * Prepare scatter chart data for createScatterChart_vanilla\r\n     */\r\n    prepareScatterChartData(data, numericKeys) {\r\n        if (numericKeys.length \u003c 2) return null;\r\n        \r\n        const xKey = numericKeys[0];\r\n        const yKey = numericKeys[1];\r\n        \r\n        // Format data for createScatterChart_vanilla\r\n        const scatterData = data.map(item =\u003e [item[xKey], item[yKey]]);\r\n        \r\n        return {\r\n            scatterData: scatterData,\r\n            axisLabels: [xKey, yKey],\r\n            title: &#96;${yKey} vs ${xKey}&#96;\r\n        };\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateChartsLeague() {\r\n    console.log('🔍 updateChartsLeague function called');\r\n    \r\n    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    console.log('🔍 Selected season/league:', selectedSeason, selectedLeague);\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        console.log('🔍 Missing season or league, returning early');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and create position charts\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_positions?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            // Create labels based on number of weeks\r\n            const numWeeks = Object.values(data.data)[0].length;\r\n            const matchDayFormat = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}') : 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            const labels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =\u003e matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', i + 1));\r\n\r\n            // Create cumulative positions chart\r\n            createLineChart(\r\n                data.data,\r\n                data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                'chartTeamPositionCumulated',\r\n                'ERROR: Position in Season Progress',\r\n                labels,\r\n                true,\r\n                'exact'\r\n            );\r\n\r\n            updateSharedLegend(data.sorted_by_total);\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading team positions:', error);\r\n        });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "function updateChartsLeague() {\r\n    console.log('🔍 updateChartsLeague function called');\r\n    \r\n    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    console.log('🔍 Selected season/league:', selectedSeason, selectedLeague);\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        console.log('🔍 Missing season or league, returning early');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and create position charts\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_positions?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            // Create labels based on number of weeks\r\n            const numWeeks = Object.values(data.data)[0].length;\r\n            const matchDayFormat = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}') : 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            const labels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =\u003e matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', i + 1));\r\n\r\n            // Create cumulative positions chart\r\n            createLineChart(\r\n                data.data,\r\n                data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                'chartTeamPositionCumulated',\r\n                'ERROR: Position in Season Progress',\r\n                labels,\r\n                true,\r\n                'exact'\r\n            );\r\n\r\n            updateSharedLegend(data.sorted_by_total);\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading team positions:', error);\r\n        });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\n                                x: {\n                                    grid: {\n                                        drawTicks: true\n                                    },\n                                    title: {\n                                        display: true,\n                                        text: window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day',\n                                        font: { weight: 'bold' },\n                                        padding: { top: 10, bottom: 10 }\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            },\n                            plugins: {\n                                tooltip: {\n                                    callbacks: {\n                                        label: function(context) {\n                                            const team = context.dataset.label;\n                                            const position = context.parsed.y;\n                                            const points = data.data.find(d =\u003e \n                                                d.team === team \u0026\u0026 d.week === context.parsed.x\n                                            )?.points || 'N/A';\n                                            return &#96;${team}: Position ${position} (${points} pts)&#96;;\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                },\n                                legend: {\n                                    position: 'right',\n                                    labels: {\n                                        padding: 20,\n                                        usePointStyle: true,\n                                        pointStyle: 'circle',\n                                        boxWidth: 10\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            },",

          }

Now I need to add the `prepareTeamPointsScatterData` method. Let me add it after the existing scatter chart method:

_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: app/static/js/content-blocks/response-display-block.js</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 23, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -959,5 +959,27 @@
              scatterData: scatterData,
              axisLabels: [xKey, yKey],
-             title: &#96;${yKey} vs ${xKey}&#96;
+             title: &#96;${yKey} vs ${xKey}&#96;,
+             isTeamPointsFormat: false
+         };
+     }
+     
+     /**
+      * Prepare team points scatter chart data for createScatterChartMultiAxis
+      */
+     prepareTeamPointsScatterData(data) {
+         if (!data || !data.data) return null;
+         
+         const teamData = data.data;
+         const teamOrder = data.sorted_by_total || Object.keys(teamData);
+         
+         // Generate labels for weeks
+         const numWeeks = Object.values(teamData)[0]?.length || 0;
+         const weekLabels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =&gt; &#96;Week ${i + 1}&#96;);
+         
+         return {
+             data: teamData,
+             order: teamOrder,
+             labels: weekLabels,
+             isTeamPointsFormat: true
          };
      }
```

</details>

_**Agent**_

## ✅ Scatter Plot Support Added - "Points per Match Day" Style!

I've successfully added scatter plot support that uses the same visualization as the "Points per Match Day" chart from your league stats page! 

### 🎯 **What I Added:**

1. **Smart Chart Detection**:
   - ✅ **Team Points Data**: Automatically detects team points format and enables scatter plot option
   - ✅ **Array Data**: Still supports regular scatter plots for numerical data pairs

2. **Dual Scatter Chart Support**:
   - ✅ **`createScatterChartMultiAxis`**: For team points data (like "Points per Match Day")
   - ✅ **`createScatterChart_vanilla`**: For regular array data with X/Y coordinates

3. **New Data Preparation**:
   - ✅ **`prepareTeamPointsScatterData`**: Formats team points data for multi-axis scatter charts
   - ✅ **Enhanced logic**: Automatically chooses the right scatter chart type based on data structure

### 🎉 **How It Works:**

**For Team Points Data (like `get_team_points`):**
- **Detection**: Recognizes the `{data: {team1: [points...], team2: [points...]}}` format
- **Chart Type**: Uses `createScatterChartMultiAxis` (same as "Points per Match Day")
- **Visualization**: Shows points spread across weeks with team colors and interactive features
- **Labels**: Automatically generates "Week 1", "Week 2", etc.

**For Regular Array Data:**
- **Detection**: Standard array with multiple numeric columns
- **Chart Type**: Uses `createScatterChart_vanilla` 
- **Visualization**: X/Y coordinate scatter plot

### 🧪 **Test It:**

1. **Go to API Test page** (`/test`)
2. **Select filters**: Season (e.g., "19/20") and League (e.g., "BayL")
3. **Test team points**: Click "Test" on `/league/get_team_points`
4. **Switch to Chart view**: Click the "Chart" tab
5. **Select Scatter**: Click the "Scatter" chart type button
6. **Enjoy**: You'll see the exact same beautiful scatter plot as "Points per Match Day"! 🎯

The scatter plot will show:
- ✅ Each team's points distributed across weeks
- ✅ Team-specific colors (same color palette as your league stats)
- ✅ Interactive ECharts features (zoom, hover, legend)
- ✅ Professional styling matching your existing charts

Now you have the full power of your "Points per Match Day" visualization right in the API test interface! 🚀

---

Please refresh the page.', 'mainContent');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED]: () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Palette changed - updating content only');\r\n            updateAllContent();\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED]: (buttonType) =\u003e {\r\n            console.log(&#96;Button pressed: ${buttonType} - updating buttons and content&#96;);\r\n            updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n            updateContentForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n        },\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---\r\n    window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    window.handlePaletteChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Palette switcher integration ---\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        updateAllContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Start initialization ---\r\n    dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\nfunction handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\n",

          {
            "lineNumber": 1063,
            "text": "// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 1064,
            "text": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1065,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---\r\n    window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    window.handlePaletteChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Palette switcher integration ---\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        updateAllContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Start initialization ---\r\n    dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\nfunction handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTableLeagueHistory() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'block';\r\n        document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'none';\r\n    document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('leagueTableHistory', '/league/get_league_history', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Global state management\r\nlet currentState = {\r\n    season: null,\r\n    league: null,\r\n    week: null,\r\n    team: null,\r\n    teamView: 'classic'\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Initialize the page\r\nfunction initializePage() {\r\n    console.log(\"Initializing page...\");\r\n    \r\n    // Get URL parameters\r\n    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n    const selectedSeason = urlParams.get('season');\r\n    const selectedLeague = urlParams.get('league');\r\n    const selectedWeek = urlParams.get('week');\r\n    const selectedTeam = urlParams.get('team');\r\n    \r\n    console.log(\"URL parameters:\", { season: selectedSeason, league: selectedLeague, week: selectedWeek, team: selectedTeam });\r\n\r\n    // --- Centralized State Management ---\r\n    currentState = {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        teamView: 'classic'\r\n    };\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 497,
            "text": "        week: selectedWeek\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "    });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 499,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 500,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501,
            "text": "function updateTableLeagueHistory() {\r"

            "text": "    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r"

          {

            "lineNumber": 504,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505,
            "text": "    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r"

            "text": "        document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'block';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507,
            "text": "        document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'none';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 508,

            "text": "    }\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "    \r"
          },

            "text": "    document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'none';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "    document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'block';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "    // Fetch and display table\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 515,
            "text": "    fetchAndRenderTable('leagueTableHistory', '/league/get_league_history', {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 516,
            "text": "        season: selectedSeason,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "        league: selectedLeague\r"

            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "    });\r"

            "text": "}\r"
          },

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 521,
            "text": "// Global state management\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 522,
            "text": "let currentState = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 523,
            "text": "    season: null,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 524,

          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 530,
            "text": "// Initialize the page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 531,
            "text": "function initializePage() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 532,
            "text": "    console.log(\"Initializing page...\");\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 533,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 534,
            "text": "    // Get URL parameters\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 535,
            "text": "    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r"

            "lineNumber": 536,

            "lineNumber": 537,

            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "    const selectedTeam = urlParams.get('team');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "    console.log(\"URL parameters:\", { season: selectedSeason, league: selectedLeague, week: selectedWeek, team: selectedTeam });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "    // --- Centralized State Management ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544,
            "text": "    currentState = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 545,
            "text": "        season: selectedSeason,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 546,
            "text": "        league: selectedLeague,\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 547,
            "text": "        week: selectedWeek,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 548,
            "text": "        team: selectedTeam,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 549,
            "text": "        teamView: 'classic'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 550,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 551,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 552,
            "text": "    // --- URL Parameter Validation System ---\r"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "function updateTableLeagueHistory() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'block';\r\n        document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'none';\r\n    document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('leagueTableHistory', '/league/get_league_history', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Global state management\r\nlet currentState = {\r\n    season: null,\r\n    league: null,\r\n    week: null,\r\n    team: null,\r\n    teamView: 'classic'\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Initialize the page\r\nfunction initializePage() {\r\n    console.log(\"Initializing page...\");\r\n    \r\n    // Get URL parameters\r\n    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n    const selectedSeason = urlParams.get('season');\r\n    const selectedLeague = urlParams.get('league');\r\n    const selectedWeek = urlParams.get('week');\r\n    const selectedTeam = urlParams.get('team');\r\n    \r\n    console.log(\"URL parameters:\", { season: selectedSeason, league: selectedLeague, week: selectedWeek, team: selectedTeam });\r\n\r\n    // --- Centralized State Management ---\r\n    currentState = {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        teamView: 'classic'\r\n    };\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 552
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 496
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/league/stats.html"
      },
      "score": 0.28271484375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // --- Smart Default Initialization ---\r\n    function initializeWithSmartDefaults() {\r\n        // Start with seasons\r\n        updateSeasonButtons();\r\n        \r\n        // After seasons load, load leagues\r\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n            updateLeagueButtons();\r\n            \r\n            // After leagues load, load weeks\r\n            setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                \r\n                // After weeks load, load teams\r\n                setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n                    updateTeamButtons();\r\n                    \r\n                    // After everything loads, update content\r\n                    setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n                        updateAllContent();\r\n                    }, 100);\r\n                }, 100);\r\n            }, 100);\r\n        }, 100);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Event Listeners ---\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        const value = event.target.value;\r\n        \r\n        // Update current state\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            currentState.season = value;\r\n            currentState.league = null;\r\n            currentState.week = null;\r\n            currentState.team = null;\r\n        } else if (name === 'league') {\r\n            currentState.league = value;\r\n            currentState.week = null;\r\n            currentState.team = null;\r\n        } else if (name === 'week') {\r\n            currentState.week = value;\r\n        } else if (name === 'team') {\r\n            currentState.team = value;\r\n        } else if (name === 'teamView') {\r\n            currentState.teamView = value;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Dispatch appropriate event\r\n        if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n            dispatchEvent(EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED, name);\r\n        } else if (name === 'week' || name === 'team' || name === 'teamView') {\r\n            dispatchEvent(EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED, name);\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // --- Smart Default Initialization ---\r\n    function initializeWithSmartDefaults() {\r\n        // Start with seasons\r\n        updateSeasonButtons();\r\n        \r\n        // After seasons load, load leagues\r\n        setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n            updateLeagueButtons();\r\n            \r\n            // After leagues load, load weeks\r\n            setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                \r\n                // After weeks load, load teams\r\n                setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n updateAllContent();\r\n                    }, 100);\r\n                }, 100);\r\n            }, 100);\r\n        }, 100);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Event Listeners ---\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        const value = event.target.value;\r\n        \r\n        // Update current state\r\n        if (name === 'season') {\r\n            currentState.season = value;\r\n            currentState.league = null;\r\n            currentState.week = null;\r\n            currentState.team = null;\r\n        } else if (name === 'league') {\r\n            currentState.league = value;\r\n            currentState.week = null;\r\n            currentState.team = null;\r\n        } else if (name === 'week') {\r\n            currentState.week = value;\r\n        } else if (name === 'team') {\r\n            currentState.team = value;\r\n        } else if (name === 'teamView') {\r\n            currentState.teamView = value;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Dispatch appropriate event\r\n        if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n            dispatchEvent(EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED, name);\r\n        } else if (name === 'week' || name === 'team' || name === 'teamView') {\r\n            dispatchEvent(EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED, name);\r\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    function updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n                updateLeagueButtons();\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateWeekButtons();\r\n                updateTeamButtons();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for week\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                // No dependent buttons for team\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // --- Content Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function updateContentForButtonType(buttonType) {\r\n        switch (buttonType) {\r\n            case 'season':\r\n            case 'league':\r\n                updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateChartsLeague();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'week':\r\n                updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n                updateHonorScores();\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'team':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n            case 'teamView':\r\n                updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n                break;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n\r\n    console.log(\"Updating available options for:\", {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        // Update available weeks\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r\n                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                let weekInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked');\r\n                if (!weekInput \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    weekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (weekInput) {\r\n                        weekInput.checked = true;\r\n                        weekInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n",

        "originalContents": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n\r\n    console.log(\"Updating available options for:\", {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        // Update available weeks\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r\n                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                let weekInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked');\r\n                if (!weekInput \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    weekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (weekInput) {\r\n                        weekInput.checked = true;\r\n                        weekInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Event handlers for different scenarios\r\n    const eventHandlers = {\r\n        [EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED]: async () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Data source changed - validating parameters and updating UI');\r\n            try {\r\n                await validateAndFixUrlParameters();\r\n                updateAllButtons();\r\n                updateAllContent();\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Error during data source change handling:', error);\r\n                // If validation fails completely, reset to defaults\r\n                const resetSuccess = await resetToDefaultParameters();\r\n                if (resetSuccess) {\r\n                    updateAllButtons();\r\n                    updateAllContent();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Show error message if even reset fails\r\n                    showDataUnavailableMessage('Unable to load data after source change. Please refresh the page.', 'mainContent');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED]: () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Palette changed - updating content only');\r\n            updateAllContent();\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED]: (buttonType) =\u003e {\r\n            console.log(&#96;Button pressed: ${buttonType} - updating buttons and content&#96;);\r\n            updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n            updateContentForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n        },\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Event handlers for different scenarios\r\n    const eventHandlers = {\r\n        [EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED]: async () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Data source changed - validating parameters and updating UI');\r\n            try {\r\n                await validateAndFixUrlParameters();\r\n                updateAllButtons();\r\n                updateAllContent();\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Error during data source change handling:', error);\r\n                // If validation fails completely, reset to defaults\r\n                const resetSuccess = await resetToDefaultParameters();\r\n                if (resetSuccess) {\r\n                    updateAllButtons();\r\n                    updateAllContent();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Show error message if even reset fails\r\n                    showDataUnavailableMessage('Unable to load data after source change. Please refresh the page.', 'mainContent');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED]: () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Palette changed - updating content only');\r\n            updateAllContent();\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED]: (buttonType) =\u003e {\r\n            console.log(&#96;Button pressed: ${buttonType} - updating buttons and content&#96;);\r\n            updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n            updateContentForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n        },\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 12,
            "line": 740

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---\r\n    window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    window.handlePaletteChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Palette switcher integration ---\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        updateAllContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Start initialization ---\r\n    dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\nfunction handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1012,
            "text": "dispatchEvent(EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED, name);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1013,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1014,
            "text": "    });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1015,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1016,
            "text": "    // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1017,
            "text": "    window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {\r"

            "lineNumber": 1019,

          {
            "lineNumber": 1022,
            "text": "        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 1063,
            "text": "// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 1064,
            "text": "function updateAvailableOptions() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1065,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---\r\n    window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    window.handlePaletteChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Palette switcher integration ---\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        updateAllContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Start initialization ---\r\n    dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\nfunction handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 1064
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 12,
            "line": 1011
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/league/stats_phase1_backup.html"
      },
      "score": 0.2270507961511612
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Event handlers for different scenarios\r\n    const eventHandlers = {\r\n        [EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED]: async () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Data source changed - validating parameters and updating UI');\r\n            try {\r\n                await validateAndFixUrlParameters();\r\n                updateAllButtons();\r\n                updateAllContent();\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Error during data source change handling:', error);\r\n                // If validation fails completely, reset to defaults\r\n                const resetSuccess = await resetToDefaultParameters();\r\n                if (resetSuccess) {\r\n                    updateAllButtons();\r\n                    updateAllContent();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Show error message if even reset fails\r\n                    showDataUnavailableMessage('Unable to load data after source change. Please refresh the page.', 'mainContent');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED]: () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Palette changed - updating content only');\r\n            updateAllContent();\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED]: (buttonType) =\u003e {\r\n            console.log(&#96;Button pressed: ${buttonType} - updating buttons and content&#96;);\r\n            updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n            updateContentForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n        },\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Event handlers for different scenarios\r\n    const eventHandlers = {\r\n        [EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED]: async () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Data source changed - validating parameters and updating UI');\r\n            try {\r\n                await validateAndFixUrlParameters();\r\n                updateAllButtons();\r\n                updateAllContent();\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Error during data source change handling:', error);\r\n                // If validation fails completely, reset to defaults\r\n                const resetSuccess = await resetToDefaultParameters();\r\n                if (resetSuccess) {\r\n                    updateAllButtons();\r\n                    updateAllContent();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    // Show error message if even reset fails\r\n                    showDataUnavailableMessage('Unable to load data after source change. Please refresh the page.', 'mainContent');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED]: () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Palette changed - updating content only');\r\n            updateAllContent();\r\n        },\r\n        [EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED]: (buttonType) =\u003e {\r\n            console.log(&#96;Button pressed: ${buttonType} - updating buttons and content&#96;);\r\n            updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n            updateContentForButtonType(buttonType);\r\n        },\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---\r\n    window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    window.handlePaletteChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Palette switcher integration ---\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        updateAllContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Start initialization ---\r\n    dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\nfunction handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\n",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---\r\n    window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    window.handlePaletteChange = function() {\r\n        dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Palette switcher integration ---\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        updateAllContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Start initialization ---\r\n    dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED);\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\nfunction handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 1064
          },
          "startPosition": {

            "line": 1011

      },
      "score": 0.2246094048023224

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        [EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED]: async () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Page loaded - initializing with smart defaults');\r\n            try {\r\n                await validateAndFixUrlParameters();\r\n                initializeWithSmartDefaults();\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Error during page initialization:', error);\r\n                // If validation fails, reset to defaults\r\n                const resetSuccess = await resetToDefaultParameters();\r\n                if (resetSuccess) {\r\n                    initializeWithSmartDefaults();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    showDataUnavailableMessage('Unable to initialize page. Please refresh.', 'mainContent');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // Dispatch events\r\n    function dispatchEvent(eventType, data = null) {\r\n        const handler = eventHandlers[eventType];\r\n        if (handler) {\r\n            handler(data);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Make event system globally accessible for navbar\r\n    window.dispatchEvent = dispatchEvent;\r\n    window.EventTypes = EventTypes;\r\n\r\n    // --- Button Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllButtons() {\r\n        updateSeasonButtons();\r\n        updateLeagueButtons();\r\n        updateWeekButtons();\r\n        updateTeamButtons();\r\n    }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 738,
            "text": "            updateContentForButtonType(buttonType);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 739,
            "text": "        },\r"

            "lineNumber": 740,

            "lineNumber": 742,

        "originalContents": "        [EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED]: async () =\u003e {\r\n            console.log('Page loaded - initializing with smart defaults');\r\n            try {\r\n                await validateAndFixUrlParameters();\r\n                initializeWithSmartDefaults();\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('Error during page initialization:', error);\r\n                // If validation fails, reset to defaults\r\n                const resetSuccess = await resetToDefaultParameters();\r\n                if (resetSuccess) {\r\n                    initializeWithSmartDefaults();\r\n                } else {\r\n                    showDataUnavailableMessage('Unable to initialize page. Please refresh.', 'mainContent');\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // Dispatch events\r\n    function dispatchEvent(eventType, data = null) {\r\n        const handler = eventHandlers[eventType];\r\n        if (handler) {\r\n            handler(data);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Make event system globally accessible for navbar\r\n    window.dispatchEvent = dispatchEvent;\r\n    window.EventTypes = EventTypes;\r\n\r\n    // --- Button Update Functions ---\r\n    function updateAllButtons() {\r\n        updateSeasonButtons();\r\n        updateLeagueButtons();\r\n        updateWeekButtons();\r\n        updateTeamButtons();\r\n    }\r\n",

        "contents": "function updateTableLeagueWeek() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = currentState?.season || document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = currentState?.league || document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = currentState?.week || document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedWeek) {\r\n        // Show message when no week is selected\r\n        const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n        const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n        \r\n        if (messageArea) {\r\n            messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n            messageArea.innerHTML = window.translations ? (window.translations['please_select_match_day'] || 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.';\r\n        }\r\n        if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Show the table and hide the message\r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (messageArea) messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('tableLeagueWeek', '/league/get_league_week_table', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

        "contents": "});\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Clear buttons if no season/league selected\r\n        document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = '';\r\n        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle week/team selection changes\r\nfunction handleWeekTeamSelection() {\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedWeek) url.searchParams.set('week', selectedWeek);\r\n    if (selectedTeam) url.searchParams.set('team', selectedTeam);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n\r\n        \r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

_**Agent**_

Now let me create a comprehensive draft specification:

## 🎯 **League Stats Refactoring Draft - Content Display Rules**

Based on my analysis of the current `league/stats.html`, here's the comprehensive specification for what content should be displayed for each filter combination:

### 📋 **Filter Hierarchy**
```
Season → League → Week → Team
```

### 🎛️ **Current Content Blocks Available**

1. **Filter Controls** (Always visible)
   - Season selector (radio buttons)
   - League selector (radio buttons)  
   - Week selector (radio buttons)
   - Team selector (radio buttons)

2. **Season Overview Section**
   - League History Table (`get_league_history`)
   - Position in Season Progress (line chart - `get_team_positions`)
   - Points in Season Progress (line chart - `get_team_points` cumulative)
   - Points per Match Day (scatter chart - `get_team_points`)
   - Average per Match Day (chart - `get_team_averages`)

3. **Match Day Section** 
   - League Results Table (`get_league_week_table`)
   - Honor Scores Card (`get_honor_scores`)

4. **Team Details Section**
   - Team Score Sheet (`get_team_week_details`)
   - Classic/New view toggle
   - Team metadata display

### 🎯 **Content Display Rules by Filter Combination**

#### **No Selection** / **Season Only**
```
✅ Show: "Please select a combination of Season and League" message
❌ Hide: All content sections
🔧 Enable: Season → League button dependencies
```

#### **Season + League** ⭐
```
✅ Show: Season Overview Section
   • League History Table
   • Position in Season Progress chart  
   • Points in Season Progress chart
   • Points per Match Day scatter chart
   • Average per Match Day chart
   • Shared team legend

❌ Hide: Match Day section message ("Please select a match day")
❌ Hide: Team Details section (show "Please select a team" message)

🔧 Enable: Week and Team button selections
```

#### **Season + League + Week** ⭐⭐
```
✅ Show: Season Overview Section (same as above)
✅ Show: Match Day Section
   • League Results Table (week-specific)
   • Honor Scores Card (week-specific)
   
❌ Hide: Team Details section (show "Please select a team" message)

🔧 Enable: Team selection
```

#### **Season + League + Week + Team** ⭐⭐⭐
```
✅ Show: Season Overview Section
✅ Show: Match Day Section  
✅ Show: Team Details Section
   • Team Score Sheet (week + team specific)
   • Team metadata: "{Team} - Match Day {Week}"
   • Classic/New view toggle
   
🎯 Full functionality available
```

#### **Season + League + Team (No Week)** ⭐⭐🔶
```
✅ Show: Season Overview Section
❌ Hide: Match Day section (show "Please select a match day" message)
✅ Show: Team Details Section
   • Show "Please select a team" message (since week is required)

⚠️ Limited functionality - team details require week selection
```

### 🔄 **Content Update Triggers**

| Filter Change | Content Updates |
|---------------|----------------|
| **Season** | All content + dependent button updates (League→Week→Team) |
| **League** | All content + dependent button updates (Week→Team) |  
| **Week** | Match Day section + Team Details section |
| **Team** | Team Details section only |
| **TeamView** | Team Details section only (Classic/New toggle) |

### 🎨 **Content Block Suggestions for Refactoring**

#### **Core Content Blocks**
1. **`SeasonOverviewBlock`** - League table + season charts
2. **`MatchDayBlock`** - Week-specific results + honor scores  
3. **`TeamDetailsBlock`** - Team score sheet + metadata
4. **`FilterControlsBlock`** - All filter selectors

#### **Chart Sub-Blocks**
1. **`SeasonChartsBlock`** - Position + Points progress charts
2. **`MatchDayChartsBlock`** - Points/Average per match day charts
3. **`HonorScoresBlock`** - Week-specific honor scores

#### **API Endpoints Used**
- `/league/get_league_history` (Season + League)
- `/league/get_team_positions` (Season + League) 
- `/league/get_team_points` (Season + League)
- `/league/get_team_averages` (Season + League)
- `/league/get_league_week_table` (Season + League + Week)
- `/league/get_honor_scores` (Season + League + Week)
- `/team/get_team_week_details` (Season + League + Week + Team)

### 🚀 **Recommended Refactoring Architecture**

```javascript
class LeagueStatsApp extends BaseContentApp {
    contentBlocks = [
        new FilterControlsBlock(),
        new SeasonOverviewBlock(),  
        new MatchDayBlock(),
        new TeamDetailsBlock()
    ]
    
    updateContent(state) {
        // Smart content visibility based on filter combinations
        // Each block decides its own visibility and data fetching
    }
}
```

This structure would make the code much more maintainable and follow the same pattern as your successful API test page! 

**What do you think of this analysis? Should we proceed with implementing this content block structure?** 🤔
