```json
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        view_mode = request.args.get('view_mode', 'own_team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}, view_mode={view_mode}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week,\r\n            view_mode=view_mode\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
```

```diff
+                 filters[Columns.week] = {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'}
              print(f"DEBUG: Using filters: {filters}")
              
```

```diff
@@ -623,15 +623,25 @@
  @bp.route('/league/get_individual_averages')
  def get_individual_averages():
-     """Get individual player averages for a season"""
+     """Get individual player averages for a season, optionally filtered by week"""
      try:
          league = request.args.get('league')
          season = request.args.get('season')
+         week_str = request.args.get('week')  # Optional parameter
          
          if not all([league, season]):
              return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters: league, season'}), 400
          
-         print(f"Individual Averages - Received request with: league={league}, season={season}")
+         # Parse week if provided
+         week = None
+         if week_str:
+             try:
+                 week = int(week_str)
+             except ValueError:
+                 return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid week parameter: must be an integer'}), 400
+         
+         week_info = f", week={week}" if week is not None else ""
+         print(f"Individual Averages - Received request with: league={league}, season={season}{week_info}")
          
-         table_data = league_service.get_individual_averages(league=league, season=season)
+         table_data = league_service.get_individual_averages(league=league, season=season, week=week)
          return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())
          
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: app/static/js/content-blocks/matchday-block.js</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 42, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -338,3 +338,45 @@
          }
      }
+ 
+     async loadIndividualAverages(state) {
+         const { season, league, week } = state;
+         
+         try {
+             console.log(&#96;Loading individual averages for ${league} ${season} week ${week}&#96;);
+             
+             const url = &#96;/league/get_individual_averages?league=${encodeURIComponent(league)}&amp;season=${encodeURIComponent(season)}&amp;week=${encodeURIComponent(week)}&#96;;
+             console.log(&#96;Fetching individual averages from: ${url}&#96;);
+             
+             const response = await fetch(url);
+             
+             if (!response.ok) {
+                 throw new Error(&#96;HTTP ${response.status}&#96;);
+             }
+             
+             const data = await response.json();
+             console.log('Individual averages data received:', data);
+             
+             // Create the table using the existing createTableBootstrap3 function
+             if (typeof createTableBootstrap3 === 'function' &amp;&amp; data) {
+                 createTableBootstrap3('weekIndividualAveragesTable', data, {
+                     disablePositionCircle: true, // Individual averages don't need team colors
+                     enableSpecialRowStyling: true
+                 });
+                 console.log('Individual averages table created successfully');
+             } else {
+                 console.warn('createTableBootstrap3 not available or no data received');
+                 const container = document.getElementById('weekIndividualAveragesTable');
+                 if (container) {
+                     container.innerHTML = '&lt;div class="alert alert-info"&gt;Individual averages data not available&lt;/div&gt;';
+                 }
+             }
+             
+         } catch (error) {
+             console.error('Error loading individual averages:', error);
+             const container = document.getElementById('weekIndividualAveragesTable');
+             if (container) {
+                 container.innerHTML = '&lt;div class="alert alert-danger"&gt;Error loading individual averages&lt;/div&gt;';
+             }
+         }
+     }
  }
```

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

## ✅ **Individual Averages Added to League + Season + Week View**

### 🎯 **Implementation Complete:**

**✅ Backend Updates:**
1. **Service Method**: `get_individual_averages()` now accepts optional `week` parameter
2. **API Route**: `/league/get_individual_averages` now accepts optional `week` query parameter
3. **Week Filtering**: Data is filtered to show only the specific week's individual player performance

**✅ Frontend Updates:**
1. **HTML Section**: Added full-width "Individual Averages - Week" card below match day results
2. **Loading Method**: `loadIndividualAverages()` fetches and displays week-specific data
3. **Integration**: Individual averages load in parallel with match day results and honor scores
4. **Table Display**: Uses existing `createTableBootstrap3` with team color circles disabled

### 📊 **New League + Season + Week View Contains:**
- ✅ **League Results - Match Day** (main week table)
- ✅ **Honor Scores** (top scores/averages for the week)  
- ✅ **Individual Averages - Week** (new: player stats filtered for this specific week)
- ✅ **Shared Legend** (team colors)

### 🔧 **Data Displayed:**
- **Player Name**: Individual player names
- **Team**: Team affiliation  
- **Games**: Number of games played (usually 1 for a single week)
- **Total Points**: Total bowling score for the week
- **Average**: Average score for the week (same as total for single games)
- **High Game**: Highest game score for the week

### 🎯 **Result:**
The **league + season + week view** now shows a comprehensive overview of that specific week's performance, including individual player statistics filtered specifically for that week, alongside the existing match day results and honor scores!

**Test this by selecting a league, season, and week - you should see the new individual averages table below the honor scores! 🎯**

---

```json
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    generateHTML(state) {\r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003e${state.league} - Season ${state.season}\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cp class=\"mb-0 text-muted\"\u003eSeason overview and analysis\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- 1st Row: League Standings (Full Width) --\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv ```diff
```
```diff
@@ -254,3 +254,45 @@
          };
      }
+ 
+     async loadTeamIndividualAverages(state) {
+         const { season, league, week, team } = state;
+         
+         try {
+             console.log(&#96;Loading team individual averages for ${team} in ${league} ${season} week ${week}&#96;);
+             
+             const url = &#96;/league/get_individual_averages?league=${encodeURIComponent(league)}&amp;season=${encodeURIComponent(season)}&amp;week=${encodeURIComponent(week)}&amp;team=${encodeURIComponent(team)}&#96;;
+             console.log(&#96;Fetching team individual averages from: ${url}&#96;);
+             
+             const response = await fetch(url);
+             
+             if (!response.ok) {
+                 throw new Error(&#96;HTTP ${response.status}&#96;);
+             }
+             
+             const data = await response.json();
+             console.log('Team individual averages data received:', data);
+             
+             // Create the table using the existing createTableBootstrap3 function
+             if (typeof createTableBootstrap3 === 'function' &amp;&amp; data) {
+                 createTableBootstrap3('teamIndividualAveragesTable', data, {
+                     disablePositionCircle: true, // Individual averages don't need team colors
+                     enableSpecialRowStyling: true
+                 });
+                 console.log('Team individual averages table created successfully');
+             } else {
+                 console.warn('createTableBootstrap3 not available or no data received');
+                 const container = document.getElementById('teamIndividualAveragesTable');
+                 if (container) {
+                     container.innerHTML = '&lt;div class="alert alert-info"&gt;Team individual averages data not available&lt;/div&gt;';
+                 }
+             }
+             
+         } catch (error) {
+             console.error('Error loading team individual averages:', error);
+             const container = document.getElementById('teamIndividualAveragesTable');
+             if (container) {
+                 container.innerHTML = '&lt;div class="alert alert-danger"&gt;Error loading team individual averages&lt;/div&gt;';
+             }
+         }
+     }
  }
```

```diff
-             await this.loadTeamWeekDetails(season, league, week, team, this.currentView);
+             // Load team details and individual averages in parallel
+             await Promise.all([
+                 this.loadTeamWeekDetails(season, league, week, team, this.currentView),
+                 this.loadTeamIndividualAverages(state)
+             ]);
          } catch (error) {
              console.error('Error loading team data:', error);
```

Let me check what other blocks might be rendering when league+season+week+team are all selected. I already know:
- **TeamDetailsBlock**: Shows when `season && league && week && team` ✅ (this is what we want)
- **MatchDayBlock**: Shows when `season && league && week` ✅ (this should NOT show when team is also selected)

Let me check the MatchDayBlock's shouldRender method:

_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file">
<details><summary>Tool use: **read_file** • Read file: app/static/js/content-blocks/matchday-block.js</summary>

</details>
</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **read_file**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent**_

Perfect! The MatchDayBlock will currently render when `league+season+week+team` are selected because it only checks for `season && league && week`. I need to modify it to NOT render when a team is also selected:

_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: app/static/js/content-blocks/matchday-block.js</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 3, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -61,5 +61,7 @@
  
      shouldRender(state) {
-         return state.season &amp;&amp; state.league &amp;&amp; state.week;
+         // Show only when season, league, and week are selected but NO team is selected
+         const hasTeam = state.team &amp;&amp; state.team !== '' &amp;&amp; state.team !== 'null';
+         return state.season &amp;&amp; state.league &amp;&amp; state.week &amp;&amp; !hasTeam;
      }
  
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

## ✅ **League + Season + Week + Team View Successfully Configured**

### 🎯 **Implementation Complete:**

**✅ Backend Updates:**
1. **Service Method**: `get_individual_averages()` now accepts optional `team` parameter for filtering by team
2. **API Route**: `/league/get_individual_averages` now accepts optional `team` query parameter
3. **Dual Filtering**: Data is filtered by both week AND team to show only that team's players for that specific week

**✅ Frontend Updates:**
1. **Team Details HTML**: Added "Team Individual Averages" section below the score sheet
2. **Loading Method**: `loadTeamIndividualAverages()` fetches week+team filtered data
3. **Integration**: Team individual averages load in parallel with team score sheet
4. **View Isolation**: Ensured only TeamDetailsBlock renders in league+season+week+team view

**✅ Block Rendering Logic:**
- **League + Season + Week**: Only `MatchDayBlock` (modified to exclude when team selected)
- **League + Season + Week + Team**: Only `TeamDetailsBlock` (with score sheet + individual averages)
- **Other combinations**: Work as before

### 📊 **New League + Season + Week + Team View Contains:**
- ✅ **Team Score Sheet** (existing - top section with view toggle)
- ✅ **Team Individual Averages** (new - filtered by week AND team)

### 🔧 **Data Displayed in Team Individual Averages:**
- **Player Name**: Only players from the selected team
- **Team**: Will show the same team name for all rows  
- **Games**: Number of games played in this specific week (usually 1)
- **Total Points**: Total bowling score for that week
- **Average**: Average score for that week (same as total for single games)
- **High Game**: Highest game score for that week

### 🎯 **Result:**
The **league + season + week + team view** now shows a focused, team-specific overview:
1. **Score sheet for the selected team** (existing functionality)
2. **Individual player stats for that team in that specific week** (new functionality)

**All other content blocks are properly excluded from this view to keep it clean and focused! 🎯**

**Test this by selecting league, season, week, AND team - you should see only the team score sheet and the team's individual player averages below it!**

---

_**Agent**_

## ✅ **Filter Controls Updated Successfully**

### 🎯 **Changes Made:**

**✅ Reordered Filter Controls:**
- **Before**: Season, League, Week, Team  
- **After**: **League, Season, Week, Team**

**✅ Removed Active Filters Section:**
- **Removed HTML**: "Active Filters:" info section with badges
- **Removed JavaScript**: `updateFilterDisplay()` method and all calls to it
- **Cleaner UI**: More streamlined filter interface

### 📊 **New Filter Layout:**
```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ League Statistics                                           │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ ┌─────────────┐ ┌─────────────┐ ┌─────────────┐           │
│ │   League    │ │   Season    │ │    Week     │           │
│ │ LL 1 Nord   │ │   22/23     │ │     3       │           │
│ │ BayL       │ │   23/24     │ │     4       │           │
│ └─────────────┘ └─────────────┘ └─────────────┘           │
│                                                             │
│ ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│ │                        Team                             │ │
│ │ Augsburg 3    Schweinfurt 1    Aschaffenburg 1       │ │
│ └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 🎯 **Benefits:**
- **League First**: Makes sense for a league-focused app
- **Logical Flow**: League → Season → Week → Team follows hierarchy
- **Cleaner UI**: No redundant "Active Filters" display
- **Less Clutter**: Simplified interface focuses on the actual filter buttons

**The filter controls now prioritize league selection and provide a cleaner, more intuitive user experience! 🎯**

```json
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls Block --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"filterControlsContainer\"\u003e\r\n        \u003c!-- Filter controls will be rendered here --\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"text-center py-5\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"spinner-border text-primary\" role=\"status\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cspan class=\"visually-hidden\"\u003eLoading filters...\u003c/span\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cp class=\"text-muted mt-2\"\u003eInitializing filter controls...\u003c/p\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- League Aggregation Block (League only) --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"leagueAggregationContainer\"\u003e\r\n        \u003c!-- League aggregation content will be rendered here --\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"text-center py-5\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"spinner-border text-primary\" role=\"status\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cspan class=\"visually-hidden\"\u003eLoading league aggregation...\u003c/span\u003e\r\n   \u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls Block --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"filterControlsContainer\"\u003e\r\n        \u003c!-- Filter controls will be rendered here class=\"visually-hidden\"\u003eLoading filters...\u003c/span\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cp class=\"text-muted mt-2\"\u003eInitializing filter controls...\u003c/p\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- League Aggregation Block (League only) --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"leagueAggregationContainer\"\u003e\r\n        \u003c!-- League aggregation content will be rendered here --\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"text-center py-5\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"spinner-border text-primary\" role=\"status\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cspan class=\"visually-hidden\"\u003eLoading league aggregation...\u003c/span\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cp class=\"text-muted mt-2\"\u003eInitializing league aggregation...\u003c/p\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- League season overview...\u003c/span\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cp class=\"text-muted mt-2\"\u003eInitializing season overview...\u003c/p\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n         "contents": "\u003cscript src=\"{{ url_for('static', filename='js/content-blocks/base-content-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ url_for('static', filename='js/content-blocks/route-test-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ url_for('static', filename='js/content-blocks/response-display-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Import Main Application --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ url_for('static', filename='js/api-test-app.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n// Initialize the API Test App\r\nwindow.apiTestApp = new APITestApp();\r\n\r\n// Initialize when DOM is ready\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    console.log('🚀 DOM loaded, initializing APITestApp...');\r\n    \r\n    // Give a short delay to ensure all scripts are loaded\r\n    setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n        window.apiTestApp.initialize().catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('❌ Failed to initialize APITestApp:', error);\r\n            \r\n            // Show error in UI\r\n            const containers = ['routeTestContainer', 'responseDisplayContainer'];\r\n            containers.forEach(containerId =\u003e {\r\n                const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n                if (container) {\r\n                    container.innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003ch6\u003eInitialization Error\u003c/h6\u003e\r\n                            \u003cp\u003eFailed to initialize API Test application:\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                            \u003ccode\u003e${error.message}\u003c/code\u003e\r\n                            \u003chr\u003e\r\n                            \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm\" onclick=\"location.reload()\"\u003e\r\n                                Try Again\r\n                            \u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    &#96;;\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        });\r\n    }, 200);\r\n});\r\n\r\n// Global debug functions\r\nwindow.debugAPITest = () =\u003e window.apiTestApp.debug();\r\nwindow.refreshAPITest = () =\u003e location.reload();\r\n\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\u003cscript src=\"{{ url_for('static', filename='js/content-blocks/base-content-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ url_for('static', filename='js/content-blocks/route-test-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"{{ url_for('static', filename='js/content-blocks/response-display-block.js') }}\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n// Initialize the API Test App\r\nwindow.apiTestApp = new APITestApp();\r\n\r\n// Initialize when DOM is ready\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    console.log('🚀 DOM loaded, initializing APITestApp...');\r\n    \r\n    // Give a short delay to ensure all scripts are loaded\r\n    setTimeout(() =\u003e {\r\n        window.apiTestApp.initialize().catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('❌ Failed to initialize APITestApp:', error);\r\n            \r\n            // Show error in UI\r\n            const containers = ['routeTestContainer', 'responseDisplayContainer'];\r\n            containers.forEach(containerId =\u003e {\r\n                const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n                if (container) {\r\n                    container.innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003ch6\u003eInitialization Error\u003c/h6\u003e\r\n                            \u003cp\u003eFailed to initialize API Test application:\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                            \u003ccode\u003e${error.message}\u003c/code\u003e\r\n                            \u003chr\u003e\r\n                            \u003cbutton class=\"btn btn-outline-danger btn-sm\" onclick=\"location.reload()\"\u003e\r\n                                Try Again\r\n                            \u003c/button\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    &#96;;\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        });\r\n    }, 200);\r\n});\r\n\r\n// Global debug functions\r\nwindow.debugAPITest = () =\u003e window.apiTestApp.debug();\r\nwindow.refreshAPITest = () =\u003e location.reload();\r\n\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    fetch('{{ url_for(\"league.get_latest_events\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            if (data \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = data.map(event =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003ca href=\"{{ url_for('league.stats') }}?season=${encodeURIComponent(event.Season)}\u0026league=${encodeURIComponent(event.League)}\u0026week=${event.Week}\" \r\n                           class=\"text-decoration-none\"\u003e\r\n                            ${event.Season} - ${event.League} - Woche ${event.Week}\r\n                            \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003e(${event.Date})\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/a\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/li\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n            } else {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003eKeine Events gefunden\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error fetching events:', error);\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item text-danger\"\u003eFehler beim Laden der Events\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n        });\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",
        "detailedLines": [

          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item text-danger\"\u003eFehler beim Laden der Events\u003c/li\u003e';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "        });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "});\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\u003c/script\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "{% endblock %} "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    fetch('{{ url_for(\"league.get_latest_events\") }}')\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            if (data \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = data.map(event =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003ca href=\"{{ url_for('league.stats') }}?season=${encodeURIComponent(event.Season)}\u0026league=${encodeURIComponent(event.League)}\u0026week=${event.Week}\" \r\n                           class=\"text-decoration-none\"\u003e\r\n                            ${event.Season} - ${event.League} - Woche ${event.Week}\r\n                            \u003csmall class=\"text-muted\"\u003e(${event.Date})\u003c/small\u003e\r\n                        \u003c/a\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/li\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n            } else {\r\n                eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item\"\u003eKeine Events gefunden\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error fetching events:', error);\r\n            const eventsList = document.getElementById('latestEvents');\r\n            eventsList.innerHTML = '\u003cli class=\"list-group-item text-danger\"\u003eFehler beim Laden der Events\u003c/li\u003e';\r\n        });\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n{% endblock %} ",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 15,
            "line": 68
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 41
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/index.html"
      },
      "score": 0.32421875
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\n{% block content %}\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\n\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\n            background-color: #0d6efd !important;\n            border-color: #0d6efd !important;\n            color: white !important;\n        }\n        \n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\n        }\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Selection Message --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n",

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\n{% block content %}\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\n\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\n            background-color: #0d6efd !important;\n            border-color: #0d6efd !important;\n            color: white !important;\n        }\n        \n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\n        }\n    \u003c/style\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Selection Message --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\n    \u003c!-- Filter Controls --\u003e\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}Home{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!--h1\u003eBowling Dashboard\u003c/h1--\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Info\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- We'll add stats here later --\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDiese Seite ist ein Proof of Concept zur Darstellung von Ergebnissen und Statistiken rund um Bowling Ligen, Tuniere und Pokalwettbewerbe.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDie Auswertungen sind oben über die Navigation zu \"League Stats\" und \"Player Stats\" zu finden.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eHauptaugenmerk liegt derzeit auf den Ligastatistiken. Alle Daten sind fiktiv, jedoch ist die Seite so aufgabeut, dass reale Daten einfach importiert werden könnten.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eBitte kommt mit Feedback und Vorschlägen gerne per Whatsapp oder im Traning auf mich zu.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003e  Cheers, Chris\u003c/p\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Letzte Events\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cul class=\"list-group\" id=\"latestEvents\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Will be populated via JavaScript --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Add JavaScript for latest events --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "{% block title %}Home{% endblock %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "{% block content %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\u003c!--h1\u003eBowling Dashboard\u003c/h1--\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "                Info\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "                \u003c!-- We'll add stats here later --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "                \u003cp\u003eDiese Seite ist ein Proof of Concept zur Darstellung von Ergebnissen und Statistiken rund um Bowling Ligen, Tuniere und Pokalwettbewerbe.\u003c/p\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "                \u003cp\u003eDie Auswertungen sind oben über die Navigation zu \"League Stats\" und \"Player Stats\" zu finden.\u003c/p\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "                \u003cp\u003eHauptaugenmerk liegt derzeit auf den Ligastatistiken. Alle Daten sind fiktiv, jedoch ist die Seite so aufgabeut, dass reale Daten einfach importiert werden könnten.\u003c/p\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "                \u003cp\u003eBitte kommt mit Feedback und Vorschlägen gerne per Whatsapp oder im Traning auf mich zu.\u003c/p\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "                \u003cp\u003e  Cheers, Chris\u003c/p\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "                Letzte Events\r"

            "text": "            \u003c/div\u003e\r"

          {

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}Home{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n\u003c!--h1\u003eBowling Dashboard\u003c/h1--\u003e\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"row mt-4\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Info\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003c!-- We'll add stats here later --\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDiese Seite ist ein Proof of Concept zur Darstellung von Ergebnissen und Statistiken rund um Bowling Ligen, Tuniere und Pokalwettbewerbe.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eDie Auswertungen sind oben über die Navigation zu \"League Stats\" und \"Player Stats\" zu finden.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eHauptaugenmerk liegt derzeit auf den Ligastatistiken. Alle Daten sind fiktiv, jedoch ist die Seite so aufgabeut, dass reale Daten einfach importiert werden könnten.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003eBitte kommt mit Feedback und Vorschlägen gerne per Whatsapp oder im Traning auf mich zu.\u003c/p\u003e\r\n                \u003cp\u003e  Cheers, Chris\u003c/p\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-6\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n                Letzte Events\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cul class=\"list-group\" id=\"latestEvents\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003c!-- Will be populated via JavaScript --\u003e\r\n                \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Add JavaScript for latest events --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function renderScatterLegend(teams) {\r\n    const legendDiv = document.getElementById('scatterPlotLegend');\r\n    if (!legendDiv) return;\r\n    legendDiv.innerHTML = teams.map((team, idx) =\u003e &#96;\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"d-flex align-items-center me-4 mb-2\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cspan style=\"display:inline-block;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:${getTeamColor(team, idx)};margin-right:8px;\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n            \u003cspan\u003e${team}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    &#96;).join('');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Initialize the page when DOM is loaded\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializePage);\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    const btn = document.getElementById('loadScatterPlotBtn');\r\n    if (btn) {\r\n        btn.addEventListener('click', renderScatterPlot);\r\n    }\r\n});\r\n// Optionally, auto-load on season/league change\r\n// Uncomment below if you want auto-update:\r\ndocument.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n    if (event.target.name === 'season' || event.target.name === 'league') {\r\n        renderScatterPlot();\r\n    }\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n{% endblock %}\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 683,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 684,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {

          {
            "lineNumber": 690,
            "text": "            \u003cspan style=\"display:inline-block;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:${getTeamColor(team, idx)};margin-right:8px;\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "function renderScatterLegend(teams) {\r\n    const legendDiv = document.getElementById('scatterPlotLegend');\r\n    if (!legendDiv) return;\r\n    legendDiv.innerHTML = teams.map((team, idx) =\u003e &#96;\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"d-flex align-items-center me-4 mb-2\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cspan style=\"display:inline-block;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:${getTeamColor(team, idx)};margin-right:8px;\"\u003e\u003c/span\u003e\r\n            \u003cspan\u003e${team}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    &#96;).join('');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Initialize the page when DOM is loaded\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializePage);\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {\r\n    const btn = document.getElementById('loadScatterPlotBtn');\r\n    if (btn) {\r\n        btn.addEventListener('click', renderScatterPlot);\r\n    }\r\n});\r\n// Optionally, auto-load on season/league change\r\n// Uncomment below if you want auto-update:\r\ndocument.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n    if (event.target.name === 'season' || event.target.name === 'league') {\r\n        renderScatterPlot();\r\n    }\r\n});\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n{% endblock %}\r\n",

        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}API Test Page{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n{% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n{% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ch1 class=\"mb-4\"\u003eAPI Test Page\u003c/h1\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n         "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}API Test Page{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n{% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n{% include class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSeason\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Weeks will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-12\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsTeam\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Teams will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ch5\u003ePoints vs. Average (Scatter Plot)\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ccanvas id=\"chartTeamPointsVsAverage\" style=\"width: 100%; min-width: 100%; height: 300px;\"\u003e\u003c/canvas\u003e\r\n    \u003cbutton id=\"loadScatterPlotBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm mt-2\"\u003eLoad Scatter Plot\u003c/button\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"scatterPlotLegend\" class=\"d-flex flex-wrap mt-3\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n  \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003c!-- Common Test Functions --\u003e\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n    // Initialize the page\r\nfunction initializePage() {\r\n    // Get any URL parameters or set defaults\r\n    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n    const selectedSeason = urlParams.get('season') || null;\r\n    const selectedLeague = urlParams.get('league') || null;\r\n    const selectedWeek = urlParams.get('week') || null;\r\n    const selectedTeam = urlParams.get('team') || null;\r\n    \r\n    // Load available seasons\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 115,
            "text": "    \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "\u003c!-- Scatter Plot Section --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "    \u003ch5\u003ePoints vs. Average (Scatter Plot)\u003c/h5\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 122,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "text": "  \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124,
            "text": "    \u003ccanvas id=\"chartTeamPointsVsAverage\" style=\"width: 100%; min-width: 100%; height: 300px;\"\u003e\u003c/canvas\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125,
            "text": "    \u003cbutton id=\"loadScatterPlotBtn\" class=\"btn btn-primary btn-sm mt-2\"\u003eLoad Scatter Plot\u003c/button\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv id=\"scatterPlotLegend\" class=\"d-flex flex-wrap mt-3\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127,
            "text": "  \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 128,
            "text": "\u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 129,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130,
            "text": "\u003c!-- Common Test Functions --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 131,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "text": "    // Initialize the page\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133,
            "text": "function initializePage() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134,
            "text": "    // Get any URL parameters or set defaults\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "text": "    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 136,
            "text": "    const selectedSeason = urlParams.get('season') || null;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 137,
            "text": "    const selectedLeague = urlParams.get('league') || null;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 138,
            "text": "    const selectedWeek = urlParams.get('week') || null;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 139,
            "text": "    const selectedTeam = urlParams.get('team') || null;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "text": "    // Load available seasons\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "    fetch('/league/get_available_seasons')\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "        "
```

_**Agent**_

Let me provide you with a diagnostic script you can run on your server to identify the issue:

## 🔍 **Server Deployment Diagnostic Script**

**Copy this script to your server and run it:**

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# Run this on your server: sudo bash diagnostic.sh

echo "=== League Analyzer Deployment Diagnostics ==="
echo ""

echo "1. Checking main directory permissions:"
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/

echo ""
echo "2. Checking if static/js exists:"
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/

echo ""
echo "3. Checking js directory contents:"
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/

echo ""
echo "4. Checking core directory:"
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/core/

echo ""
echo "5. Checking content-blocks directory:"
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/content-blocks/

echo ""
echo "6. Checking specific files that are 404ing:"
echo "base-content-block.js:"
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/content-blocks/base-content-block.js

echo "url-state-manager.js:"
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/core/url-state-manager.js

echo ""
echo "7. Flask app status:"
systemctl status flaskapp --no-pager -l

echo ""
echo "8. Nginx error logs (last 10 lines):"
tail -10 /var/log/nginx/error.log
```

## 🚀 **Quick Fix Commands**

If the files exist but have permission issues, try these commands on your server:

```bash
# 1. Ensure proper ownership and permissions
sudo chown -R flaskuser:www-data /var/www/league_analyzer
sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/league_analyzer
sudo chmod -R 644 /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/**/*.js

# 2. Restart services
sudo systemctl restart flaskapp
sudo systemctl restart nginx

# 3. Check if files are accessible via web
curl -I http://localhost/static/js/content-blocks/base-content-block.js
```

## 🔧 **Common Issues & Solutions:**

1. **Files missing after git pull**: The JavaScript files weren't committed properly
2. **Permission issues**: Files exist but nginx can't serve them  
3. **Nginx config issue**: Static file serving not configured correctly
4. **Git deployment issue**: Files didn't get pulled properly

**Run the diagnostic script first and share the output - it will help identify the exact issue!**

Perfect! 🎉 **The missing JavaScript files have been committed and pushed to your repository.**

## 🚀 **Solution: Update Your Server**

Now run these commands on your server to get the missing files:

```bash
# 1. Navigate to your app directory
cd /var/www/league_analyzer/

# 2. Pull the latest changes (including the missing JS files)
sudo git fetch
sudo git reset --hard origin/main

# 3. Set proper ownership and permissions
sudo chown -R flaskuser:www-data /var/www/league_analyzer
sudo chmod -R 755 /var/www/league_analyzer

# 4. Restart services
sudo systemctl restart flaskapp
sudo systemctl restart nginx

# 5. Verify the files are now there
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/core/
ls -la /var/www/league_analyzer/app/static/js/content-blocks/
```

## 🔍 **What Happened:**

The issue was that the **core JavaScript files** (`url-state-manager.js`, etc.) and the **main league-stats-app.js** file were never committed to your git repository. When you deployed to your server, these files were missing, causing the 404 errors.

The content-blocks JavaScript files were already tracked by git (that's why some functionality might have partially worked), but the core infrastructure files were missing.

## 🎯 **After the server update, your league stats view should work perfectly!**

Let me know if you need any help with the server deployment or if you encounter any other issues!

---
